Interface ChatOptions.Builder<B extends ChatOptions.Builder<B>>

All Superinterfaces:
Cloneable
All Known Subinterfaces:
StructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder<B>, ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnthropicChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, AnthropicChatOptions.Builder, BedrockChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, BedrockChatOptions.Builder, DeepSeekChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, DeepSeekChatOptions.Builder, DefaultChatOptionsBuilder, DefaultStructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder, DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder, GoogleGenAiChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder, MistralAiChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, MistralAiChatOptions.Builder, OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, OllamaChatOptions.Builder, OpenAiChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, OpenAiChatOptions.Builder
Enclosing interface:
ChatOptions
public static interface ChatOptions.Builder<B extends ChatOptions.Builder<B>> extends Cloneable
Builder for creating ChatOptions instance.
